entries.title: Exposition on the Psalms of David on psalms 48:14
entries.excerpt: And what should you recount? Two things: because all preaching ought to be directed toward two ends: namely, toward showing the magnificence of God, as when one preaches the faith; or toward announcing the benefits of God, so that charity may be kindled in their hearts. As to the first, he says, "For this is God, our God": Bar. 3: "And after this, on earth," etc. Heb. 13: "Jesus Christ, yesterday and today, the same forever." As to the second, he says, "He himself will rule us forever": Mt. 28: "Behold, I am with you," etc. Ps. 22: "The Lord rules me, and nothing," etc.
